header: The values behind every Desiderio release
subheadline: Three principles that decide what gets merged — and what gets sent back.

value_items.title: Editors first
value_items.description: If a TYPO3 editor cannot understand an element from its backend preview, it is not done. All 244 elements preview before they ship.

value_items.title: Accessible by default
value_items.description: WCAG-minded markup is the baseline, not a feature flag. Focus states, ARIA, and contrast survive every one of the 15 theme presets.

value_items.title: No rebuilds
value_items.description: Themes, density, radius, and dark mode are runtime decisions. Switching a preset repaints the whole site without touching a build pipeline.
